mapper.select: SELECT * FROM vr.tn_vr_ncnfrm WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} ORDER BY item_no
SELECT * FROM vr.tn_vr_ncnfrm WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND item_no = #{itemNo}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) FROM vr.tn_vr_ncnfrm WHERE vr_id = #{vrId}
mapper.update: UPDATE vr.tn_vr_ncnfrm SET ncnfrm_se_cd = #{ncnfrmSeCd}, desc_cn = #{descCn}, resol_desc_cn = #{resolDescCn}, resol_dt = #{resolDt}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND item_no = #{itemNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM vr.tn_vr_ncnfrm WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND item_no = #{itemNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vr.tn_vr_ncnfrm WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND resol_dt IS NULL
